/opt/homebrew/bin/aarch64-apple-darwin24-g++-14 -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/RayTracer.out.dir/RayTracer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RayTracer.out.dir/Ray.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RayTracer.out.dir/SceneObject.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RayTracer.out.dir/Sphere.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RayTracer.out.dir/Plane.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RayTracer.out.dir/Cylinder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RayTracer.out.dir/Cone.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RayTracer.out.dir/Circle.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RayTracer.out.dir/TextureBMP.cpp.o -o RayTracer.out  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib /opt/homebrew/lib/libglm.dylib -framework OpenGL -framework OpenGL -framework GLUT -framework Cocoa
